name: IFSS, Internatinal Furry Space Station 🚀
description:
Blasting Off In... 3.. 2.. 1.. TAKEOFF!
You've spent years studying the stars and wishing since you were very young to be an astronaut... Now you have finally done it! You'll meet fellow astronauts, repair the spaceship, make discoveries, find aliens, go on space walks, wait go back... ALIENS? Unbeknownst to you, space is a lot weirder than you first thought, and you could be up with some interesting threats...
creator: AFellowFerret
